message:
fix(connectors): Anthropic retry-after parsing, Bitbucket schema and capability refs

Anthropic: Parse Retry-After header from 429/529 responses instead of
using hardcoded delays (30s/60s). Previously the header was available on
the Response but discarded before reaching parse_error_response. Now
extract_retry_after() reads the header before consuming the response
body, and the parsed value is used with the hardcoded value as fallback.

Bitbucket: Add missing destination_branch field to pull_requests.create
input_schema — the invoke method extracts it with a default of "main"
but agents had no way to discover the parameter. Fix 2 incorrect
ai_hints references from non-existent "bitbucket.repos.list" to the
actual operation ID "bitbucket.repositories.list".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
